sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13660" key="a)po/seisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπό-σεισις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n13660.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shaking off: licentious dance,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:101" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.101</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
